versions.version_description: Transcribed from the official version here https://youtu.be/zWd__w5UWVc no capo, thank you GTA V for letting me remember this song.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]Fm[/ch]
[ch]Db[/ch]   [ch]C7[/ch]   [ch]Fm[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]
[ch]Db[/ch]   [ch]C7[/ch]   [ch]Fm[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]   [ch]C7[/ch]   [ch]Fm[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]
Fm7 (×4)[/tab]
[ch]Bbm[/ch]   [ch]Gbmaj7[/ch]
[ch]Gbmaj7[/ch]   [ch]Bbm7[/ch]

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]Gbmaj7[/ch]                   [ch]Bbm7[/ch]
Ain't no personal thing, boy[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]                       [ch]F[/ch]
But you have got to stay away[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm7[/ch]               [ch]Eb[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]
Far, far away from my heart, my heart[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm7[/ch]                     [ch]Eb[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]
Don't you know what your kiss is doing[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm7[/ch]                  [ch]Eb[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]
Let me tell it to you from the start, boy[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]            [ch]C7[/ch]            [ch]Fm[/ch]
I don't wanna fall in love[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
No, no[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]            [ch]C7[/ch]            [ch]Fm[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]
Love cuts just like a knife[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]           [ch]C7[/ch]            [ch]Fm[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]
You make the knife feel good, baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]            [ch]C7[/ch]            [ch]Fm[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]
I'll fight you to the end[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]
Baby[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]Bbm7[/ch]
You've been hanging around, boy[/tab]
[tab][ch]Eb[/ch]                   [ch]F[/ch]
And you have started sinking in[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm7[/ch]               [ch]Eb[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]
Whoah, baby you're way out of line now[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm7[/ch]             [ch]Eb[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]
Unaware how this all got started[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm7[/ch]                  [ch]Eb[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]
Let me tell it to you one more time, boy[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]            [ch]C7[/ch]            [ch]Fm[/ch]
I don't wanna fall in love[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
No, no[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]            [ch]C7[/ch]            [ch]Fm[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]
Love cuts just like a knife[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]           [ch]C7[/ch]            [ch]Fm[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]
You make the knife feel good, baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]            [ch]C7[/ch]            [ch]Fm[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]
I'll fight you to the end[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]
Baby[/tab]

[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]         [ch]Bbm[/ch]        [ch]Fm/C[/ch]
I learned something about myself[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Last night with you I knew[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]            [ch]Bbm[/ch]         [ch]Db[/ch]
I didn't want nobody else[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gb[/ch]         [ch]Fm9[/ch]           [ch]Ebm[/ch]        [ch]Fm[/ch]
And you're scaring me to death now, baby[/tab]

[Solo]
[ch]Bbm[/ch]   | [ch]Eb[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch] | [ch]Bbm[/ch]   | [ch]Eb[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch] |   (... x2)


[Chorus]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]            [ch]C7[/ch]            [ch]Fm[/ch]
I don't wanna fall in love[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
No, no[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]            [ch]C7[/ch]            [ch]Fm[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]
Love cuts just like a knife[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]           [ch]C7[/ch]            [ch]Fm[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]
You make the knife feel good, baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]            [ch]C7[/ch]            [ch]Fm[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]
I'll fight you to the end[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]
Baby[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]            [ch]C7[/ch]            [ch]Fm[/ch]
I don't wanna fall in love[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
No, no[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]            [ch]C7[/ch]            [ch]Fm[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]
Love cuts just like a knife[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]           [ch]C7[/ch]            [ch]Fm[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]
You make the knife feel good, baby[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]            [ch]C7[/ch]            [ch]Fm[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]
I'll fight you to the end[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]       [ch]Eb[/ch]
Baby[/tab]
[Fade out]
